case_title: LYNCH, JERRY vs. WILLIAMS, MARY ANN et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, JERRY SERVED MAY-02-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARY ANN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARY ANN AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 29A SAN JOSE, SAN FRANCISCO, STAYED UNTIL JUN-06-1995, LEASE FORFEITED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES FILED BY DEFENDANT AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M. ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 08
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $20.51 FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYNCH, JERRY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, MARY ANN AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M.

THIS JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, JERRY LYNCH, SHALL HAVE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES KNOWN AS 29A SAN JOSE, SAN FRANCISCO. THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IN THIS MATTER IS DECLARED FORFEITED. A WRIT OF POSSESSION MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY BUT ACTUAL EVICTION IS STAYED UNTIL 6-6-95. PLAINTIFF, JERRY LYNCH, WAIVES BACK BACK RENT AND DAMAGES. THERE WILL NOT BE ANY FURTHER STAYS ON THIS MATTER. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT ON THE PREMISES AFTER THE EXECUTION OF THIS JUDGMENT SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED AND PLAINTIFF MAY DISPOSE OF THE PROPERTY IN ANY WAY HE SEES FIT DEFENDANTS REPRESENTS THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER PERSONS IN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES. IF THE DEFENDANTS VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 6-6-95, PLAINTIFF WILL SIGN A STIPULATION VACATING THE JUDGMENT AND DISMISSING THE ACTION.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M.
PRE-JUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION FILED BY DEFENDANT AMBJORNSON, SHIRLEY M.
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
